infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Red Grid MGRS uses your location to display your current grid coordinates. No location data is stored or transmitted.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Red Grid MGRS uses Bluetooth to connect to Meshtastic radios for off-grid mesh networking. No data is transmitted over the internet.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Red Grid MGRS uses Bluetooth to connect to Meshtastic radios for off-grid mesh networking. No data is transmitted over the internet.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Red Grid MGRS uses your location to display your current grid coordinates. No data is stored or transmitted.

plugins.cameraPermission: Red Grid MGRS uses your camera to take geotagged photos. Photos are stamped with your MGRS grid and saved to your device only.
plugins.photosPermission: Red Grid MGRS accesses your photo library to select images for geostamping. No photos are uploaded or transmitted.
Red Grid MGRS saves geostamped photos to your photo library. No photos are uploaded or transmitted.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Red Grid MGRS uses Bluetooth to connect to Meshtastic radios for off-grid mesh networking. No data is transmitted over the internet.
